title: paeonia peregrina proles paradoxa
intro: Paeonia peregrina proles paradoxa, also known as the Chinese peony or Paeonia anomala, is a plant species in the family Paeoniaceae. The roots and rhizomes of this plant have been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia peregrina proles paradoxa include relieving menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes are often dried and made into decoctions or infusions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
